backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all data types (appointments, clients, financial statistics, reports) and implementing business logic for a scheduling and revenue tracking application with authorization support.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three dashboard card features that retrieve financial data from existing sections instead of recalculating, with high confidence test IDs REQ-5, REQ-6, and REQ-7.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend TypeScript/React components describing routing, hooks, pages, dialogs, and styling with emphasis on client selection, appointment management, and financial displays.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application titled 'Mon Agenda Revenus' that loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing authentication flow with Internet Identity, user profile setup, theme provider, and TanStack Router configuration for Dashboard, RapportPDF, and ClientDatabase routes.
frontend/src/components/AppointmentActio: Dialog component presenting edit and delete action choices for appointments with options to modify/delete single appointments or all future appointments for the same client.
frontend/src/components/AppointmentDelet: Alert dialog component handling appointment deletion with two modes (single or all future for client) using the DemandeEdition type and displaying loading states during mutation.
frontend/src/components/AppointmentDialo: A dialog component for creating and editing appointments with form fields for client info, date/time, service details, payment amounts, and recurrence patterns (weekly, monthly, annual). Integrates with client records for auto-fill and handles both add and update operations.
Displays appointments in a tabbed list (all/paid/unpaid) with cards showing client details, date/time, service, payment status, and recurrence info. Clicking an appointment opens an action dialog for further operations.
frontend/src/components/ClientPhotoField: A form field component for uploading and managing client photos that automatically crops images to 35mm × 45mm portrait format. Handles file validation, image processing, preview display, and removal.
frontend/src/components/ComptaMoisCalend: A monthly calendar table view for accounting that displays appointments in time slots (7:00-23:30) across days, with inline editing for payment amounts and comments. Includes navigation between months and integrates with appointment action dialogs.
frontend/src/components/FinancialOvervie: Displays three financial summary cards showing total paid revenue, outstanding amounts due, and total appointments completed for the current month. Formats numbers in French locale.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: A simple footer component displaying copyright information and a link to caffeine.ai with a heart icon.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Main navigation header with app branding, navigation buttons (Dashboard, PDF Report, Client Database), new appointment button, and user dropdown menu with logout. Handles authentication state and route highlighting.
frontend/src/components/MonthlyListingTa: Renders a table displaying monthly client listings with appointment counts, revenues, advances, and credit balances. Supports manual January credit overrides and calculates totals across all clients.
frontend/src/components/MonthlySummarySe: Displays a card with a table summarizing monthly revenues ("Revenus Faits et Payés") for all 12 months of a given year, with a total row at the bottom.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for first-time user profile setup, prompting the user to enter their name and saving it via mutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with authentication, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for login, logout, and identity state management using AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user profiles, client records, appointments, monthly listings, financial statistics, and PDF reports via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark themes, typography classes (Verdana-based for tables and titles), and table alignment styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient, InternetIdentityProvider, and renders the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/AgendaPage.tsx: Empty file placeholder for the agenda/calendar page component.
frontend/src/pages/ClientDatabasePage.ts: Client database management page with CRUD operations, photo upload, CSV export, alphabetical sorting, and appointment tracking integration.
frontend/src/pages/ComptaMoisPage.tsx: Empty file placeholder for the monthly accounting page component.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard displaying financial overview, monthly listing table, calendar view, and monthly summary with year/month navigation and revenue calculations.
frontend/src/pages/ListingMensuelPage.ts: Empty file placeholder for the monthly listing page component.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Landing page with Internet Identity login button and feature cards showcasing appointment management, payment tracking, financial statistics, and history.
frontend/src/pages/RapportPDFPage.tsx: Monthly report page that generates and exports HTML reports with calculated monthly listing data including client appointments and financial totals.
frontend/src/pages/SemainePage.tsx: Empty file placeholder for the weekly view page component.
frontend/src/utils/bigintMath.ts: Utility functions for bigint arithmetic operations including absolute value, clamping, sum, min/max to avoid precision loss from Number conversion.
frontend/src/utils/csvExport.ts: CSV export utilities that escape fields, convert object arrays to CSV format with headers, and trigger browser downloads with UTF-8 BOM.
frontend/src/utils/imageCrop.ts: Image processing utilities that crop/resize images to 35:45 passport photo aspect ratio, convert to Uint8Array for storage, and generate blob URLs for display.
frontend/src/utils/monthlyListing.ts: Provides pure functions for calculating monthly financial metrics (RDV Faits, Revenus, Credits) from calendar appointments using bigint arithmetic. Implements a two-pass calculation approach to correctly handle credit carry-forward across months.
frontend/src/utils/timeRange.ts: Utility functions for working with bigint nanosecond timestamps, including month range calculations and comparisons. Avoids precision loss from Number conversion for Internet Computer Time values.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Handles URL parameter extraction and session storage management for both query strings and hash-based routing. Provides functions to persist, retrieve, and clear parameters across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, extended theme with sidebar/chart colors, custom animations, and typography/container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking dashboard financial calculations, known issues with version 135, and pending feature requests to recalculate annual statistics and monthly averages from 'Résumé Mensuels' data instead of independent calculations.
